name: spaceface
description: SpaceFace — a semi-3D top-down space trading/combat/mining game (Three.js).

scripts.check:contracts: node scripts/sf.mjs validate test/47a.inputs.json test/47a.telemetry.expected.json src/data/scenarios/47a.scenario.json
scripts.check:replay: node scripts/sf.mjs replay verify test/47a.inputs.json --seed 47 --ticks 720 --expect test/47a.telemetry.expected.json --hash --repeat 20 --reload-at 600
scripts.check:sim:v3: node scripts/sf-sim.mjs run 47a --seed 47 --ticks 720 --inputs test/47a.inputs.json --expect test/47a.telemetry.v3.expected.json --hash --repeat 20 --reload-at 600 --flight-system v3
scripts.check:sim:v3:compare: node scripts/sf-sim.mjs compare 47a --seed 47 --ticks 720 --inputs test/47a.inputs.json --expect test/47a.telemetry.v3.expected.json --reload-at 600 --flight-system v3
scripts.check:presentation: node scripts/check-presentation-cues.mjs && node scripts/check-sg08-golden-trace.mjs && node scripts/check-sg08-mix-profile.mjs && node scripts/check-sg08-render-vfx.mjs
scripts.check:sg05: node scripts/check-sg05-scenario.mjs && node scripts/check-sg05-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-sg05-branch-policies.mjs && node scripts/check-sg05-ui-lifecycle.mjs
scripts.check:sg02: npm run check:sg02:intake && npm run check:physics-authority && npm run check:sg02:dynamic-lab && node scripts/check-sg02-authority.mjs && node scripts/check-sg02-production-combat-port.mjs && node scripts/check-sg02-tether.mjs && node scripts/check-sg02-tether-break.mjs && node scripts/check-sg02-dash-collision.mjs && node scripts/check-sg02-save-reload.mjs && npm run check:sim:dynamic
scripts.check:sg06: npm run check:sg06:intake && npm run check:sg06:production-ports && npm run check:sg06:encounter-sink && npm run check:sg06:encounter-owner && npm run check:sg06:live-shadow && npm run check:sg06:registry-init && npm run check:sg06:live-registry && npm run check:sg06:tether-break && npm run check:sg06:formation && npm run check:sg06:ai
scripts.check:flight: node test/flightV3.spec.mjs && node scripts/flight-lab-sim.mjs && node scripts/probe-flight-visual.mjs
scripts.check:flight:clean: node test/flightV3.spec.mjs && node scripts/flight-lab-sim.mjs && node scripts/probe-flight-visual.mjs --clean-runs 5 --strict-warnings --no-write
scripts.check:art: node scripts/check-kestrel-asset.mjs && node scripts/check-parts-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-sg04-release-assets.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-hero.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-silhouette.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-damage.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-leak.mjs && node scripts/check-lod.mjs && node scripts/check-collision-debug.mjs && node scripts/check-concord-patrol.mjs && node scripts/check-reaver-pirate.mjs && node scripts/check-faction-ships.mjs && npm run check:47a:visuals
scripts.check: npm run check:launch-policy && node scripts/check-data.mjs && node scripts/check-data-refs.mjs && npm run check:balance && npm run check:sg02 && npm run check:sg05 && npm run check:sg06 && npm run check:combat && npm run check:save-resume-confidence && npm run check:new-game-first-run && node scripts/check-ui-screen-imports.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-a11y.mjs && npm run check:ui:perf && npm run check:bar:narrative && node scripts/check-codex-narrative.mjs && node scripts/check-wcag-contrast.mjs && node scripts/check-input-modalities.mjs && node scripts/check-countermeasures.mjs && node scripts/check-onboarding.mjs && npm run check:mission-preflight && npm run check:recommended-next && npm run check:market-nav && npm run check:claim-base && node scripts/check-wingmen.mjs && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:replay && npm run check:presentation && npm run check:camera && node scripts/check-gameplay-core.mjs && npm run check:sim && npm run check:sim:compare && npm run check:sim:profile && npm run check:sim:long && npm run check:sim:long:compare && npm run check:47a:tactics && npm run check:47a:live-branch && npm run check:47a:live-cold-open && npm run check:47a:counterplay && npm run check:47a:death-retry && npm run check:slice-scope && node scripts/check-phase0-slice-contract.mjs && npm run check:flight:v3 && npm run check:flight:clean && node scripts/check-sectorSim.mjs && npm run check:art && npm run check:bundle
scripts.check:ci: npm run check:launch-policy && node scripts/check-data.mjs && node scripts/check-data-refs.mjs && npm run check:balance && npm run check:sg02 && npm run check:sg05 && npm run check:sg06 && npm run check:combat && npm run check:save-resume-confidence && npm run check:new-game-first-run && node scripts/check-ui-screen-imports.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-a11y.mjs && npm run check:ui:perf && npm run check:bar:narrative && node scripts/check-codex-narrative.mjs && node scripts/check-wcag-contrast.mjs && node scripts/check-input-modalities.mjs && node scripts/check-countermeasures.mjs && node scripts/check-onboarding.mjs && npm run check:mission-preflight && npm run check:recommended-next && npm run check:market-nav && npm run check:claim-base && node scripts/check-wingmen.mjs && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:replay && npm run check:presentation && npm run check:camera && node scripts/check-gameplay-core.mjs && npm run check:sim && npm run check:sim:compare && npm run check:sim:profile && npm run check:sim:long && npm run check:sim:long:compare && npm run check:sim:v3 && npm run check:47a:tactics && npm run check:47a:live-branch && npm run check:47a:counterplay && npm run check:47a:death-retry && npm run check:slice-scope && node scripts/check-phase0-slice-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-sectorSim.mjs && npm run check:art && npm run check:bundle
